features: repairs live usage calculation after a release deployment
prevents core self-update when current Cloudflare bindings cannot be read safely
preserves the LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR Durable Object binding during core deployment
automatically starts or provisions the live usage coordinator after deployment
adds a D1-leased fallback usage cycle while the Durable Object binding is temporarily unavailable
runs live usage bootstrap from Telegram webhook traffic as well as web requests and Cron
keeps the reseller menu layout manager introduced in 3.3.48
does not change the database schema and excludes README files

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot
required_bindings: Core: PASARGUARD_DB, EDGE_WORKER, PROCESSOR_WORKER and LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.binding_preservation: passed: deployment now fails closed when Cloudflare Worker settings cannot be read
validation.webhook_bootstrap: passed: live usage bootstrap is no longer skipped for /telegram/webhook
validation.fallback_lease: passed: fallback uses an atomic app_settings lease to prevent duplicate cycles
validation.live_api: not run; requires production PasarGuard, Cloudflare and Telegram credentials

limitations: The Durable Object is still the preferred 8–300 second scheduler; the fallback depends on incoming requests or Cron while the binding is being repaired.
Production verification requires deployment because Cloudflare bindings and PasarGuard usage APIs are not available offline.
title: ترمیم محاسبه Live مصرف
summary: Binding محاسبه زنده هنگام بروزرسانی حفظ و پس از استقرار دوباره راه‌اندازی می‌شود؛ در قطع موقت نیز چرخه جایگزین مصرف را ادامه می‌دهد.
changes: جلوگیری از انتشار Core با keep_bindings خالی در صورت خطای خواندن تنظیمات Cloudflare.
حفظ و راه‌اندازی مجدد LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR پس از بروزرسانی.
فعال‌کردن Bootstrap مصرف زنده روی ترافیک Webhook تلگرام.
افزودن محاسبه جایگزین دارای قفل D1 هنگام نبود موقت Durable Object.
حفظ کامل مدیریت چیدمان کلیدهای نسخه 3.3.48.
